episodes.title: Weekend Update: Trump Fires Bondi Over Epstein Files, Says He'll Bring Iran Back to Stone Age - SNL
episodes.description:
Weekend Update anchors Colin Jost and Michael Che tackle the week’s biggest news, like Trump’s plans for a presidential library.
